title: Agentic Workflow
description: A multi-step automated process where AI agents execute tasks, make decisions, and hand off results without human intervention at each stage.

title: Hallucination
description: When an AI model generates plausible-sounding but factually incorrect information, including fabricated citations, invented data, or false claims.

title: Citation Verification
description: The automated process of validating that citations in AI-generated content reference real, accessible sources with accurate metadata.

title: Structured Output
description: AI-generated content delivered in a predefined, typed format — not free-form text — with consistent schema, metadata, and audit information.

title: Pipeline Orchestration
description: The system that coordinates the execution order, data flow, and error handling across multiple agents in an agentic workflow.
